High-Tack Industrial Labels

Heavy-duty adhesives for machines, surfaces, and long-term industrial application.

Architectural Build Specifications

Material 3M Vinyl Temp -20C to 80C Quantity Min 500 units

Elite Knowledge Base

What is the minimum volume for enterprise orders?
Minumum order volume depends on the industrial line. Typically, stationery starts at 500 units, while luxury packaging starts at 100-200.
Can I upload my own architectural artwork?
Yes. Once you initialize an inquiry, our technical team will request your high-res PDF or AI vector files for color calibration.
